name: Tijuana Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef together with chopped onion and minced garlic in a skillet over medium heat. Remove from heat and set aside.
2. In a lightly oiled crockpot, layer the ingredients as follows: start with a tortilla, then meat, enchilada sauce, cheese, another tortilla, chili beans, cheese, corn, another tortilla, repeat the layers until all ingredients are used.
3. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 5 to 7 hours, stirring occasionally.
4. Alternatively, this recipe can be made as a lasagna by doubling the quantities and layering in a 9 X 13 inch casserole dish. Top with foil and bake at 325 degrees F for 2 hours.
